title: BEM-878 worker review
objective:
Create file governance/audit/internal/results/BEM878_WORKER_PROTOCOL_V16_REVIEW.md with content # BEM-878 WORKER PROTOCOL V1.6 REVIEW
Status: WORKER_REVIEW_READY
Findings:
- Operator remarks are valid. свод правил and реестр правил should not coexist.
- Use one canonical term: реестр правил.
- реестр правил is both the rules source and the versioned storage of rules, owners, conditions, source incidents, actions, prohibitions, and conflict policy.
- Architecture and objects/elements sections must be merged to avoid repeating the same Director/Worker/Curator information.
- v1.6 should keep v1.5 improvements: object and element terms, unified workspaces, testing as assigned function, managed common channel, product repo support loop.
- Roadmap must explicitly create Director with at least two internal contours: rules management contour and planning/analytics/strategic decisions contour.
Recommendation:
- Approve protocol v1.6 with notes and prepare DOCX for operator review.
No issue comments.
